channel.title: Iot on My cool new Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Iot on My cool new Blog

item.title: Making sense of data
item.description: “One of the myths about the Internet of Things is that companies have all the data they need, but their real challenge is making sense of it. In reality, the cost of collecting some kinds of data remains too high, the quality of the data isn’t always good enough, and it remains difficult to integrate multiple data sources.”
